messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi, I need help with an urgent order issue. My order was accidentally sent to Texas, and I need to get the tracking number. Also, I want to return everything in that order except for the pet bed, and I’d like the refund to go back to my Amex card. I don’t have the order number handy. Can you help me with this?
